audience: Consultants, advisers and subject-matter experts considering a credible business podcast
primaryDutchSearchIntent: Experts en consultants helpen een inhoudelijk geloofwaardige en haalbare podcastformule opbouwen

searchIntent.question: How can an expert or consultant create a credible podcast format that remains sustainable?
searchIntent.geographicContext: English-speaking experts and professional service businesses in Belgium

longTailKeywords: how to plan an expert podcast
directAnswer: A credible expert podcast starts with a specific audience promise, a repeatable format and an editorial process for evidence, guests, recording, review and distribution. Choose a pace the expert can sustain without weakening accuracy or client work.
title: Podcast for experts and consultants: build a credible format
metaDescription: Build a credible expert podcast with a clear audience promise, repeatable format, editorial planning, responsible evidence, guest preparation and useful measurement.
h1: Podcast for experts and consultants: build a credible format
factsToPreserve: A podcast does not guarantee reach, authority or enquiries
Platform plays and downloads do not prove understanding, leads or revenue
Confidentiality, personal data, consent and accuracy must be addressed for client cases
Video is optional and should serve a defined purpose
Research, fact-checking and distribution must fit the publication rhythm
